sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 46:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 46:1
items.html: A descent of light by the power of the coarseness, meaning the power of yearning that there is in the emanated being, is called “extended” or “extension.”
